productName: Torus - Infused Ceramic - Chai Latte x Paradise Pop - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Chai Latte x Paradise Pop and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
